name: Chewies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Semi-sweet chocolate chips or bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.
3. Place caramels and 2/3 cup evaporated milk in a saucepan. Melt slowly over low heat.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine the remaining 2/3 cup evaporated milk, melted butter, cake mix, and nuts.
5. Spread half of the cake mixture in the prepared pan. Bake for 6 minutes.
6. While the cake is hot, sprinkle chocolate bits on top.
7. Spread the melted caramels over the chocolate bits.
8. Crumble the remaining cake mix over the caramel.
9. Bake for another 20 minutes or until done. Cool and cut into squares.
